refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize cycle time for the load→travel→dump cycle by optimizing load handling, travel efficiency, and dump operations.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and high-level. Decomposing it into sub-functions targeting each phase of the cycle (load, travel, dump) allows focused design parameters and clearer verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure cycle time p95 under representative duty cycles and site conditions, verifying each sub-function's contribution to overall cycle time reduction.

selected_dp.selected_dp: Automated load handling system, Optimized travel path planning, Efficient dump mechanism

potential_sources: Load handling affects travel start time
coupling_check.notes: The DPs are logically decoupled by cycle phase but require coordination at the system level to avoid timing conflicts.

assumptions_risks: Assumes accurate site and duty cycle data for travel optimization
Risk of integration complexity between load and travel systems
High safety criticality requires robust fail-safes in automation
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider explicit coordination DP or interface to manage timing dependencies between load, travel, and dump phases.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system integration and coordination of load, travel, and dump operations

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Exchange real-time operational data for cycle time monitoring and optimization feedback

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receive operational commands and cycle targets from higher-level control or teleoperation

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Send safety alerts related to cycle operations and automation status

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Support communication between modules and remote operators

module_containment_scores.notes: Centralizes cycle time optimization logic and coordination, minimizing diffusion.
Contains physical actuation but less suited for cycle time logic centralization.
Primarily for remote control, not cycle time optimization.
Focuses on safety alerts, not cycle time control.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing cycle time optimization and coordination in NGHE Solution module reduces diffusion and improves maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in NGHE Solution module due to integration of multiple cycle phases
Risk of bottleneck if NGHE Solution module fails or is overloaded
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor module complexity and consider sub-modularization within NGHE Solution if needed.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR decomposition into load, travel, and dump sub-functions is clear and maps well to selected DPs.

diffusion_risks: Integration complexity within NGHE Solution module
Potential over-centralization of cycle time logic
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores favor NGHE Solution as the best architectural boundary for cycle time optimization.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via telemetry data and cycle time measurements at the NGHE Solution module level.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of cycle time optimization responsibility to NGHE Solution module.

recommended_revisions: Add explicit coordination DP/interface for timing dependencies between cycle phases.
Plan for modularization within NGHE Solution to manage complexity.

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment satisfy the requirements and architectural constraints with manageable risks.

revise.why: Introduce explicit coordination DP/interface to handle timing dependencies between cycle phases.

assumptions: Site and duty cycle data are accurate and available for travel optimization.
Safety criticality is addressed by separate safety services module.
open_risks: Integration complexity within NGHE Solution module.
Potential bottleneck or failure impact centralized in NGHE Solution.
evidence_needed: Cycle time measurement data under representative conditions.
Verification of coordination mechanisms between cycle phases.
